chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc: Application No.S-30 of 2026 “Mst Qaima versus SSP, Tando Allayar & others” DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2026 Mr. Shahnawaz Ali Kunbhar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, D.P.G a/w SIP Sanjay Kumar PS Taluka Mirpurkhas and SIP Abdul Haleem PS Sultanabad. Mr. Muhammad Ismail advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.8 and 9. = In compliance with the last order, the police have produced the detenue, namely Baby Eman, daughter of Wali Muhammad, before this Court. She has stated before this Court that she wishes to reside with her husband, Shahzaib, who is her legally wedded husband. The detenue is permitted to go with her husband. However, learned counsel for the parties are directed to arrange a meeting of the detenue with the applicant, if so required. The detenue is further directed to cooperate with the Investigation Officer for the purpose of recording her statement. In view of the above, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is hereby disposed of. JUDGE Adnan Ashraf Nizamani
